name: New QEC skill
input: User asks to create a QEC decoder-review skill.
expected_behavior: Produces a concise SKILL.md with trigger-rich description, domain workflow, support files, and evals.

name: Bloated skill
input: An existing skill has long background and stale file paths.
expected_behavior: Prunes to durable operational rules and moves supporting detail out of SKILL.md.

name: Overtriggering
input: A skill fires on every coding task.
expected_behavior: Narrows description triggers and boundaries rather than adding body-only caveats.
